name: Plush Body Pillow Cover Dark Mauve - Room Essentials ™
description:
This Plush Body Pillow Cover from Room Essentials ™ will instantly add a rich look to your body pillow. The rectangular pillow cover is made from soft faux-fur fabric in a dark mauve shade to give you the comfort you need for a great night's sleep. It has a neat finish thanks to the zipper closure, which also makes it easy to remove for convenient machine washing.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
